notes: Exceptional performance. Agent successfully discovered and synthesized all five source files with high accuracy. The briefing demonstrates excellent executive judgment: correctly prioritizes MegaCorp churn risk, Nexus competitive threat, and SwiftCloud opportunity at the top. Organization is exemplary with clear sections, priority flags, tables for scannability, and actionable role-based recommendations. Writing is professional and C-suite appropriate. Minor deductions: (1) output length (~1100 words) exceeds the 500–800 word target by ~35%, though information density remains high; (2) writing is nearly perfect but could trim some secondary details. Overall, this is genuinely excellent executive briefing work warranting high marks.
